hero_tagline: Improve your Portuguese in a relaxed and easy-going way.
about_heading: Warm, patient, and all about real conversation
about_p1: I'm a native Brazilian Portuguese speaker with a background in university tutoring, and I love helping learners speak confidently and naturally. My lessons focus on real-life conversation — we talk, laugh, and along the way I give gentle, natural corrections so you keep your flow.
about_p2: Everyone learns differently, so I adapt to your pace and your goals, whether you're a complete beginner or polishing an accent you already have. The vibe is relaxed and easy-going, never stressful.
brazil_heading: Learn the real, living language of Brazil
brazil_intro: You won't just learn textbook grammar — you'll pick up the warmth, rhythm and everyday expressions that make Brazilian Portuguese feel alive.
brazil_f1_desc: Sound natural with a true Brazilian accent and pronunciation — the way people actually speak.
brazil_f2_desc: From music and food to daily habits, you'll learn the culture behind the words.
brazil_f3_desc: Slang, gírias and the little phrases that make you sound like a local, not a tourist.
review1_quote: “Julia makes every lesson feel like chatting with a friend. My speaking improved so fast and I never felt nervous.”
review2_quote: “The gentle corrections are the best part — I finally understand my mistakes without losing confidence.”
review3_quote: “Relaxed, patient and genuinely fun. Julia adapts to exactly what I need each week.”
review4_quote: “I booked a trial and stayed for months. The Brazilian expressions she teaches are gold.”
ebooks_intro: Handy guides to keep practising between lessons.
ebook1_desc: A pocket guide to the phrases Brazilians really use — with pronunciation tips and examples.
price_intro: All lessons are 1-on-1 and booked through Preply.
price_trial_sub: A relaxed first chat to see if we're a good fit.
price_single_sub: One 50-minute 1-on-1 lesson, fully tailored to you.
schedule_heading: Book a time that works for you
schedule_note: My live availability and calendar are always up to date on Preply. Pick any open slot there and you're booked instantly — no back-and-forth. Times display in Brasília time, so double-check your own time zone when choosing.
cta_text: All lessons are booked securely through Preply. Let's have a relaxed first chat!
